title: "[GOOD FIRST ISSUE] "
labels: good first issue, help wanted

---

## What to do

<!-- Pick one of the tasks below and delete the rest -->

**Option A: Fix a typo**
Find and fix any spelling mistake in the codebase.

**Option B: Add a missing OS**
Add a new operating system (Fedora, Debian, or Arch) to the simulator.
- Add logo SVG to `public/images/`
- Add config in `src/data/`
- Add scenes if needed

**Option C: Improve accessibility**
Add `alt` text, `aria-label`, or keyboard navigation to any component.

**Option D: Add a new theme**
Create a new color theme in `src/index.css`.

## Steps

1. Fork this repo
2. Create a branch: `git checkout -b your-fix`
3. Make your change
4. Test: `npm run dev`
5. Open a Pull Request

## Need help?

Comment on this issue or tag `@jeevannar16-web` in your PR.

---

Earn **Pull Shark** achievement when your PR is merged! 🦈
